title: Autonomous loop improvement ticket artifact inspection in operator plan v0
problem: Autonomous researcher loop may seed improvement ticket drafts under scratch artifact paths, but operator plan mode does not yet surface the latest improvement ticket artifact status alongside autonomous_loop_scratch_status.
acceptance_criteria: Operator plan includes read-only improvement ticket artifact status when scratch loop report references seeded drafts.
Missing artifact reports honest not_run status without failing plan mode.
No queue writes, promotion, or public surface changes.
rollback_plan: Revert improvement artifact inspection helper only.
